summary: Large stage decomp PR for grfzerocar: filled previously empty src/melee/gr/grfzerocar.c with F-Zero car data tables, default scale/translate/rotate data, a setup_car_child helper, and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC. It also made grAnime_801C6C0C non-static and exported it in granime.h so grfzerocar could reuse the animation-binding path. decomp.dev reported one new .rodata match and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC improving from 0.00% to 98.74%. Human review evidence is minimal; the only human note says this was a very large function attempted with Claude.

key_files.role: Added the main grfzerocar implementation, data tables, default RST constant, setup_car_child helper, and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC.
Changed grAnime_801C6C0C from static to externally visible.
Added the public prototype for grAnime_801C6C0C.

what_changed: Implemented grFZeroCar_801CAFBC in grfzerocar.c, building and modifying a tree of HSD_JObj objects for F-Zero car stage content.
Added grFZeroCarEntry with two s16 fields and four child indices, plus a 30-entry grFZeroCar_803E0BD8 table using -1 sentinels for absent child slots.
Added struct grFZeroCar_RST and const grFZeroCar_803B7E50 containing identity scale, zero translation, and identity quaternion rotation.

Added static inline setup_car_child, which loads an archive via grDatFiles_801C6330, fetches a JObj via Ground_801C13D0, applies animation and material animation through grAnime_801C6C0C, requests animation with HSD_JObjReqAnimAllByFlags, sets AObj rate with HSD_ForeachAnim/HSD_AObjSetRate, attaches the JObj, and scales the parent X/Y.

grFZeroCar_801CAFBC now resets root scale, optionally calls lb_8000F9F8 when mode is nonzero, allocates translation JObjs, initializes matrices with PSMTXIdentity, sets scl to NULL, and attaches nodes with HSD_JObjAddNext/HSD_JObjAddChild.
The function applies Ground_801C0498 ground scale to inserted translation JObjs and uses Ground_801C4100 traversal to select child attachment points listed in grFZeroCar_803E0BD8.
grAnime_801C6C0C was promoted from a file-local static function to a public granime API and declared in granime.h.
decomp.dev reported matched data +40 bytes, grFZeroCar_801CAFBC +2977 bytes to 98.74%, .data +388 bytes to 99.10%, plus smaller .sdata2 and .sdata improvements.
smart_moves: Reused the existing grAnime_801C6C0C animation setup instead of duplicating granime internals in grfzerocar, requiring only a targeted static-to-public header change.
Captured the car-child topology as a data table, which made the repeated child-selection behavior explicit and helped recover .data matching.
Kept a small setup_car_child helper for the repeated archive/JObj/animation/scale sequence while marking it static inline, a common compromise between readability and preserving generated code shape.
Preserved low-level HSD object setup details visible in the diff: identity matrix initialization, scl = NULL, AddNext before attaching to the root, and explicit scale/translate/rotation setter calls.
Used local Vec3 and Quaternion copies from grFZeroCar_803B7E50 before calling HSD_JObj setters, which is the kind of temporary-lifetime detail that often matters for matching.
Included PAD_STACK(0x18) and specific HSD_ASSERT call sites, indicating attention to stack shape and assert metadata.
decomp_lessons: When a stage module needs an internal animation helper from granime, prefer exporting the existing addressed symbol in the header if the callsite evidence supports it.
Large HSD_JObj setup functions can often be decomposed by first reconstructing constant transform data and topology tables; here the table work produced near-complete .data and .rodata matching.

Do not flatten repeated child-selection blocks too aggressively: the diff uses four explicit Ground_801C4100 traversal blocks for c0 through c3, which may reflect compiler shape needed for a large near-match.
For ground/stage object construction, synthetic JObjs may need exact initialization order: allocate, assert, PSMTXIdentity, clear scl, then link with HSD_JObjAddNext/HSD_JObjAddChild.
Archive entries can contain animation and material animation pointers that must be null-checked separately before calling grAnime_801C6C0C and HSD animation APIs.

Scale behavior was table-dependent: active child count selected scale_factor values of 1.1 for one active child, 1.0 for two or three, and 0.9 for four. Keep this logic data-driven rather than guessing from object names.
naming_conventions: Stage module symbols use the grFZeroCar_ address naming pattern, e.g. grFZeroCar_801CAFBC, grFZeroCar_803B7E50, and grFZeroCar_803E0BD8.
Local recovered structs used module-prefixed names: grFZeroCarEntry and grFZeroCar_RST.
Unknown struct fields remained conservative as unk0 and unk2 rather than invented semantic names.
The helper setup_car_child was descriptive and lower_snake_case because it was file-local, unlike address-bearing exported symbols.
granime public symbols follow grAnime_<address>, and the header prototype retained the address comment /* 1C6C0C */.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Made setup_car_child static inline, likely to allow helper structure in source without forcing an extra emitted function.
Kept ext_count as s16 cast from count and computed offset as ext_count * 0x34 before archive entry access.
Used s16* data_ptr and grFZeroCarEntry* tbl advanced together in a fixed 30-iteration loop.
Used explicit pointer casts and offsets into archive data: archive->unk4->unk8 + offset, then entry + 4 for animation and entry + 8 for material animation.
Allocated HSD_JObj translation nodes, initialized their matrices with PSMTXIdentity, and set tra_jobj->scl = NULL.
Applied HSD_JObjReqAnimAllByFlags with flags 0x497 and HSD_ForeachAnim with flags 0x76a4, HSD_AObjSetRate, AOBJ_ARG_AF, and rate 1.0.
Used Ground_801C4100 traversal loops from child for each nonnegative table child index instead of abstracting the traversal into an array loop.
review_feedback: No human review comments or review records were captured in the PR slice.
The author wrote: "This might be the largest function I've sicced Claude on yet, ha", suggesting the large function was AI-assisted, but no detailed rationale was provided.
decomp.dev bot reported GALE01 progress: one new match for main/melee/gr/grfzerocar .rodata (+40 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%).
decomp.dev bot reported grFZeroCar_801CAFBC improved by +2977 bytes from 0.00% to 98.74%, with .data, .sdata2, and .sdata also improved.
